title: botrychium dissectum var. oneidense
intro: Botrychium dissectum var. oneidense, also known as Oneida fern, is a rare and unique variety of the fern family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although its use and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
